title: Update on the Fire Incident at Our Lady and St James, Bangor
body:
We are grateful to the Lord that the boiler fire incident in our church was brought under control in good time by the fire service, and that no serous harm or damage occurred to our church building and nothing untoward took place.
Although the boiler and heating system will remain out of use until repairs are completed, the church building is safe and fully usable for our services. We hope the Lord blesses us with mild weather in the coming days so that we may continue our worship together as usual.
